overview: CampusEvents is a full-stack Smart Campus Event Management System with role-based access for Admins and Students. Features a modern dark glassmorphism UI with neon gradient accents, complete event CRUD, registration management, analytics dashboards with charts, and a feedback system.
features: Role-based login (Admin & Student) via Internet Identity
Admin Dashboard with KPI cards, pie chart, and bar chart
Student Dashboard with event stats and quick actions
Event browser with search, filters, and pagination
Admin event CRUD with form validation
Dark glassmorphism UI with neon gradients and smooth animations
